Say hello.
We’ll save you a seat.

Have a question about today’s menu, catering, lost items, or a private coffee cart? Send us a note or call the shop.

Send a message

What can we help with?

Keep it short if you like. We’ll get back to you as soon as the espresso rush slows down.

Thanks! Your message is ready. Please send it through your email app.

Hours

Open daily for cozy cups.

Kitchen closes 30 minutes before the cafe. Seasonal specials change every Friday.

Monday – Friday
7:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Saturday
8:00 AM – 4:00 PM
Sunday
8:00 AM – 2:00 PM

Visit us

128 Market Lane

Find us on the sunny corner by the flower stand. Street parking is easiest before 9 AM and after 2 PM.

Get directions Ask about catering
☕

Bean & Bloom Coffee

Fresh espresso · Warm pastries · Friendly tables

Quick answers

Do you take catering orders?

Yes. We offer coffee travelers, pastry boxes, and small event service. Please message us at least 48 hours ahead.

Is there seating?

Yes. We have indoor tables, two window seats, and a few outdoor chairs when the weather is kind.

Are dogs welcome?

Service animals are welcome inside. Friendly pups can join you on the patio.

© 2026 Bean & Bloom Coffee

(555) 014-8632 hello@beanandbloom.coffee
